name: Mints (Candy)
recipeIngredient: 2 drops or more green food coloring
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and beat at high speed until well blended.
2. Knead the mixture until smooth.
3. Shape mints into candy molds.
4. Place the shaped mints on cookie sheets covered with paper towels.
5. Cover the cookie sheets with paper towels.
6. Leave overnight to set.
